title: XXL-JOB v3.4.0 发布 | OpenClaw 集成、合并调度、健壮性及体验增强
content: XXL‑JOB v3.4.0 introduces OpenClaw integration with a built‑in “openClawJobHandler” for fast AI task development. It adds batch‑update scheduling, reducing SQL load, and enhances logging, routing, and cron parsing. Configuration limits for task parameters (2048 chars) and executor names (64 chars) are increased, and executor ID types are changed to long. Minor fixes, Docker image switch, dependency upgrades, and code refactors improve stability, performance, and usability. The release includes updated database scripts and expanded features for AI and security.

title: 做了一个给 AI 智能体做实时安全拦截的开源工具，欢迎来喷
content: I developed an open‑source tool, AgentTrust, to enforce real‑time security checks between AI agents and system tools. Before any action, the tool evaluates the operation; if uncertain, it defers to the language model, which cautions the user and blocks potentially risky commands. It can detect attack chains—e.g., harmless reading of a config plus an external request combined with encoding. The library supports direct protocol integration, is easy to configure for Claude Code and Cursor, and requires Python 3.9+.

title: 一颗子弹打退人类文明十年 | 原文
content: A single inexpensive bullet on August 10, 1915, killed a 27‑year‑old British wireless operator in the trenches of Gallipoli. The death shocked Britain’s scientific community, with figures like Rutherford and Millikan publicly expressing grief. The incident is portrayed as a moment where human civilization’s progress was set back by a decade due to the arbitrary loss of a single life in World War I.

title: 免费甘特图星甘 StarGantt 假期不打烊！推出小时模式、优化微信登录，AI 生成更稳定
content:
清明假期期间，星甘团队围绕几个非常实际的使用场景持续优化：排期到小时维度、登录要更顺、AI生成要更稳。如果你正在找一款既能做项目排期、又能兼顾协作与效率的免费甘特图工具，这一轮更新值得重点看看。 1. 甘特图支持小时视图：更适合细颗粒度排期

除了默认视图、月视图、季度视图之外，星甘StarGantt最近新增了小时视图。

这项能力特别适合以下场景：

• 活动执行排期
• 生产/运维值班安排
• 短周期研发任务拆分
• 需要精确到小时的当天计划管理

相比只按“天”来排，小时视图能让任务衔接、工时分配和阶段安排看得更细。尤其在临时协调…

title: 胖东来发布调查报告：送检鸡蛋全部合格，将依法维权
content: Pang Donglai released a comprehensive investigation in response to claims that its fresh eggs contained excessive carotene. The company tested around 150 egg samples from multiple brands at three independent labs; all key metrics, including carotene levels, were within acceptable limits. Production sites and feed were also inspected with compliant results. Pang Donglai criticized the unverified “Wang Haicai” assessment, declared its commitment to food safety, and announced it will pursue legal action to protect its reputation.

content:
大家好，DockMaster Pro 今天正式发布首个版本 v1.0.0。 DockMaster Pro 是一款 macOS Dock 栏增强工具，致力于将原生 Dock 从「应用启动器」升级为「生产力中枢」。如果你觉得 macOS 原生 Dock 的功能过于单一，缺乏个性化空间，DockMaster Pro 正是为此而生。

主题引擎

content: The Economist article examines how bond markets reflect the dilemma between rising inflation and potential recession, highlighting how investors balance expectations of higher inflation—which pressures yields upward—with fears of a slowdown that could lower rates. This back-and-forth creates volatility in bond prices and yields, showcasing the market’s struggle to reconcile conflicting economic signals.

title: 鸿海 3 月营收同比增长 45.57%
content: Foxconn reported its revenue for March 2026 at NT$803.7 billion, up 34.9% month‑over‑month and 45.57% year‑over‑year—the highest on record. For the first quarter of 2026, revenue reached NT$2.1296 trillion, down 18.18% from the previous quarter but up 29.68% from a year earlier, again the largest first‑quarter figure in company history.

title: MateClaw 1.0.0 正式版发布，开源的 JAVA 版本龙虾
content: 在 AI Agent 赛道百花齐放的 2026 年，开发者们对“数字生命中枢”的渴望达到了顶峰。前有 72 小时斩获 6 万 Star 的 OpenClaw [1]，后有各类基于 Python 和 Node.js 的智能体框架层出不穷。然而，在企业级应用市场占据绝对主导地位的 Java 生态，却始终缺乏一个开箱即用、安全可靠且支持多端触达的 AI Agent 平台。 今天，这一局面被彻底打破。基于 Java 17 + Spring Boot 3.5 + Vue 3 打造的开源个人与企业级 AI 助手系统——MateClaw 正式发布…

content: Hong Kong’s finance chief, Chan Maobo, noted that the IPO market remains strong, with fundraising surpassing HK$103 billion in the first quarter, ranking first worldwide and totaling around HK$237 billion. In uncertain external conditions, many firms view Hong Kong as a critical platform for raising funds and expanding overseas.

title: 多部短剧 AI 角色「撞脸」易烊千玺，工作室发声明称已委请律师开展维权工作
content: Several short‑form series have used AI‑generated characters that closely resemble Chinese pop star Yi Yangqianxi. Yi’s management released a statement saying the actor has not worked on those shows and has not authorized the AI transformations, asserting the activity constitutes infringement. The studio has engaged a lawyer to protect its rights, will preserve evidence, assess litigation options, and has warned the parties responsible to remove and cease distribution of the infringing content, promising legal action against violators.

content: Kimi has launched a Kimi Code early‑access program, allowing paid users to apply through the console for extra usage limits and beta access to new Code models.
